goal: 回填 provider registration 与安装文档修复提交

summary.title: 回填 provider registration 与安装文档修复
summary.what: 为三个已推送提交建立 Mainline 覆盖：cbce51c 增加 baseUrl 字段并提供 enhanced summary example；e3e8148 在 provider registration 中使用非空 baseUrl 和 apiKey；d917bb8 将安装说明简化为 pi extension 命令流程。
summary.why: 这些提交修复 provider 注册可用性和安装路径文档，但缺少 Mainline 语义记录；回填后可以解释 baseUrl/apiKey 处理和安装文档变更的原因。
summary.user_goal: 回填 provider registration 与安装文档修复提交

decisions.point: Provider registration 的 baseUrl/apiKey 处理
decisions.chose: 显式提供 baseUrl 字段，并在注册 provider 时使用非空 baseUrl 与 apiKey。
decisions.rationale: provider registry 需要稳定的 endpoint/auth metadata；空 baseUrl 会导致下游行为不可靠。

decisions.chose: 把安装说明收敛到 pi extension 命令。
decisions.rationale: 用户安装 Pi extension 时应优先使用 Pi 原生扩展管理路径，减少手工步骤和歧义。

review_notes: 后续 commits 继续修改 README/INSTALL/index.ts；本 seal 只覆盖 provider registration 和安装文档修复。

architectural_claims: Provider registration should carry non-empty baseUrl and apiKey metadata.
Installation docs should use Pi extension commands as the primary workflow.
behavioral_changes: Provider registration gained explicit baseUrl/apiKey handling.
Enhanced summary example was added for users/developers.
Installation documentation was simplified around pi extension commands.

data_model_changes.name: baseUrl
data_model_changes.migration_notes: Existing configs continue to work; registration now supplies explicit endpoint metadata.

security_implications: apiKey handling stays within existing provider registration/auth path; no new credential storage.
